changes.description: Extracted useLocalStorageSync helper hook to consolidate 4 duplicated useEffect blocks (load-on-mount + persist-on-change) into 2 calls, applying DRY principle
Wrapped handleBranchClick in useCallback to prevent unnecessary re-renders of BranchListItem children

refactorings_applied: DRY: Extracted useLocalStorageSync hook to eliminate duplicated localStorage load/persist pattern in SidebarContext
Performance: Wrapped handleBranchClick in useCallback to stabilize reference for child components
message: Refactoring complete. Applied DRY principle to localStorage sync pattern and improved render performance with useCallback.
